ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bank_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank account */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account type */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Number of the bank account */,
  "account_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the bank account */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank */,
  "minimum_inflow" TEXT /* Minimum amount that has to be paid in every month */,
  "overdraft_limit" TEXT /* An overdraft is an extension of credit from a lending institution when an account reaches zero. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate applied to the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_accounts_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_accounts_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Default interest rate for the account type */,
  "minimum_balance" TEXT /* Minimum balance required for the account type */,
  "maximum_withdrawal" TEXT /* Maximum withdrawal limit for the account type */,
  "annual_fee" TEXT /* Annual fee associated with the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the bank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the bank was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the bank's information was last updated */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the bank */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the bank's website */,
  "branch_count" INTEGER /* Number of branches the bank has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "money_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each money transfer */,
  "transfer_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the money transfer */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the money transfer was made */,
  "beneficiary_bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary bank */,
  "sender_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transfer was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transfer (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transfer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_money_transfers_beneficiary_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_bank_id") REFERENCES beneficiary_banks ("beneficiary_bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_money_transfers_sender_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_account_id") REFERENCES bank_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_banks" (
  "beneficiary_bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary bank */,
  "beneficiary_bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary bank */,
  "beneficiary_bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the beneficiary bank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the beneficiary bank was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the beneficiary bank's information was last updated */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the beneficiary bank */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the beneficiary bank's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance plan */,
  "benefits_summary_url" TEXT /* URL that goes directly to the summary of benefits and coverage for the specific standard plan or plan variation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the plan's information was last updated */,
  "coverage_amount" TEXT /* Maximum coverage amount provided by the plan */,
  "premium" TEXT /* Monthly premium for the plan */,
  "coverage_period" TEXT /* Duration of coverage (e.g., 1 year, 5 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plan_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the benefit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the benefit's information was last updated */,
  "coverage_limit" TEXT /* Maximum coverage limit for the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_plan_benefits_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., account, transfer, insurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit log was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES bank_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
